title: The Blockchain Revolution: Unpacking Cryptocurrencies' Past and Future
topic: The History and Future of Cryptocurrencies

questions.sentence: The advent of cryptocurrencies marked a pivotal moment in digital finance, introducing a novel way to conduct transactions without traditional intermediaries like banks.
At its core, Bitcoin, and indeed most cryptocurrencies, relies on a technology called blockchain.
Ethereum, launched in 2015, significantly expanded the scope of blockchain technology by introducing "smart contracts."
Volatility remains a significant concern, with prices often fluctuating dramatically in short periods.
Looking to the future, cryptocurrencies and blockchain technology are poised to continue their transformative trajectory.
